title: Knight Shaders
description: A lightweight Minecraft shader with volumetric lighting, dynamic skies, bloom, god rays, and customizable cinematic visuals.
body:
### ABOUT
Knight Shader adds cinematic lighting, volumetric clouds, bloom, god rays, and a dynamic sky to Minecraft. Featuring a warm color palette and customizable color grading, it delivers stunning visuals with a lightweight design.

### License

Knight Shader is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International **(CC BY 4.0)** License.

You are free to:

- Share — copy and redistribute the shader pack in any medium or format
- Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the shader pack for any purpose

Under the following condition:

Attribution — You must give appropriate credit to GamesofDev, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made.

For more information, visit: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
